sectiondef.header: Register offsets of XADC in the Device Config

description.para: The following constants provide access to each of the registers of the XADC device.

sectiondef.header: XADC Interrupt Status/Mask Register Bit definitions

description.para: The definitions are same for the Interrupt Status Register and Interrupt Mask Register.

sectiondef.header: XADC Miscellaneous Control Register Bit definitions
Internal Register offsets of the XADC

description.para: The following constants provide access to each of the internal registers of the XADC device.

briefdescription.para: Seq Reg 04 Adc Input Mode Select.
Seq Reg 05 Adc Input Mode Select.

sectiondef.header: OT Upper Alarm Threshold Register Bit Definitions

briefdescription.para: Read a register of the XADC device.

detaileddescription.para: This macro provides register access to all registers using the register offsets defined above.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
is the offset of the register to read.

simplesect.para: C-style Signature: u32 XAdcPs_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset);

briefdescription.para: Write a register of the XADC device.

detaileddescription.para: This macro provides register access to all registers using the register offsets defined above.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
is the offset of the register to write.
is the value to write to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style Signature: void XAdcPs_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset,u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: Formats the data to be written to the the XADC registers.

parameterdescription.para: is the offset of the Register
is the data to be written to the Register if it is a write.
specifies whether it is a Read or a Write. Use 0 for Read, 1 for Write.

simplesect.para: C-style Signature: void XAdcPs_FormatWriteData(u32 RegOffset, u16 Data, int ReadWrite)
